name: Unity Requirement Analysis
description: Analyze a Unity big-event requirement and produce a workflow-ready requirement artifact.
goal: Extract event goals, reward surfaces, content modules, constraints, open questions, and review risks for a Unity activity workflow.
quality: Explain the event goal in concrete player-facing terms.
Call out reward systems that must be split into independent modules.
List unclear points that need human review before module mapping.
Keep the result readable by an engineering user.
